sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2025-07-10 17:22
- Distance: 6.4 km
- Moving time: 32:07
- Elapsed time: 32:10
- Elevation gain: 113.8 m
- Average heart rate: 167.3 bpm
- Max heart rate: 178 bpm
- Average watts: 227 W
- Average speed: 12 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `3` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `170.0 bpm`, ranging from `159.8` to `176.0 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `174.0 spm`, with a working range of `152.2` to `175.7 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `173.0 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `175.0 spm` (+2.0 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:00 /km` across `6.414 km` in `32:07` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `4:59 /km` and second-half pace was `5:02 /km` (+3 s/km), so pace stayed broadly even.

- Strava summary HR came in at `167.3 bpm` average and `178 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `161.0 bpm` in the first half and `174.1 bpm` in the second (+13.2 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `32:07` out of `32:10` elapsed (99.8%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `5` stop segments and `0.5%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `117.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `42.8 m` and `60.2 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `58.8 m` in the first half and `58.4 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
